summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a stellar May ’77 show, highlighted by a smoking Lazy Lightning > Supplication, superb Samson piano and a standout Brown Eyed Women.
review: The recording is a pristine sound‑board source that many reviewers say sounds better than the official box set. Musically the concert shines with a groovy set list – Lazy Lightning into Supplication, Samson’s piano work, Scarlet Begonias, Brown Eyed Women and an inspired Rain – all delivered with the band in top form.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are five‑star, praising both the performance (numerous standout songs) and the board quality as exceptional.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Board sound is described as crystal‑clear, better than the official release, with no noted flaws or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the set as groovy and flowing from start to finish, with seamless transitions and a particularly strong second half.

band_member_comments.Keys: Keith's piano work on Samson is singled out as excellent.
